MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KEVIN PEREZ AND JENNA PEREZ's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Although the motion may be untimely filed there appears to be no opposition to the routine request, and it is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Curtis C. Karnow; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
